Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic,Inc. is present. Represented by Manneo Fuentes.
Attorney Margaret Pompei appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Peter Chrisler is present.
Attorney Lily North representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Andy Westley litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of Oct-09-2012 is vacated.(501/JPT)
